name: Excited Dog
description: WATER?! OH BOY!! BEST DAY EVER!! 🐕
messages: WATER?! DID SOMEONE SAY WATER?! 🐕💦
OH BOY OH BOY DRINK TIME!!! 🐾
I'M SO PROUD OF YOU!!! DRINK UP!! 🐶
HYDRATION!! MY FAVORITE THING!! 💦💦
YOU'RE DRINKING WATER?! BEST DAY EVER!! 🐕
tail wagging intensifies DRINK WATER!! 🐾
GOOD HUMAN!! VERY GOOD HUMAN!! 💧🐶
I BROUGHT YOU WATER!! wait no… DRINK IT!! 🐕
BORK BORK HYDRATION!! 🐾💦
ZOOMIES!! but first, water!! 🐕💨
I LOVE WATER AND I LOVE YOU!! 💧❤️
BALL?! No wait— WATER!! EVEN BETTER!! 🐶💦
11/10 HYDRATION!! GOOD HUMAN!! 🐾
WOOF WOOF DRINKY DRINKY!! 🐕💧
IS IT DRINK TIME?! IT'S ALWAYS DRINK TIME!! 🐶
so much excite!! water incoming!! 💦🐕
YOU DID A HYDRATE!! I'M SO HAPPY!! 🐾✨
BEST HUMAN!! DRINKING WATER LIKE A CHAMP!! 🐶
SNOUT BOOP!! now drink water!! 🐕💦
I BELIEVE IN YOU!! CHUG CHUG!! 🐾💧
